title: Reporting for Registrants and Applicants - Canada.ca
content:
## Reporting for Registrants and Applicants
On Nov. 16 2006, the Pest Control Products Incident Reporting Regulations and the Pest Control Products Sales Information and Reporting Regulations were published in Canada Gazette Part II and became enforceable. Under both sets of regulations, registrants are required to submit information to Health Canada's Pest Management Regulatory Agency. Please see the web sites below for more information on the individual programs.
- Mandatory Incident Reporting
- Mandatory Sales Reporting

## Additional Resources
- Evaluation of Pesticide Incident Reports
